chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. S- 138 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of bail application. 01.09-2025. Mr. Hamayoun Sheikh, Advocate for Appellant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. ************* 1. Deferred. 2. Learned counsel for appellant after arguing the matter at some length requires that present Criminal Acquittal Appeal be disposed of and arising from criminal proceedings evidence thereof may not be considered in his approach for civil remedies against the private respondents. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh does not oppose the same. Even otherwise the requirement of proceedings of a case depending upon evidence in his own matter, the present Criminal Acquittal Appeal is not being pressed, stands disposed of with observation that in case the appellant requires to file any civil proceedings in accordance with law, the same shall be treated on its own merits. The Criminal Acquittal Appeal is disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E Irfan/PS 2
